title: Ensure safe flag is set to false when serializing non-dictionary objects in Django JSON encoded responses
description: Ensures that the 'safe' flag is set to false when serializing non-dictionary objects in Django JSON encoded responses to avoid potentially dangerous JSON encodings.
message: Serializing non-dictionary objects in Django JSON encoded responses without setting the 'safe' flag to false.
recommendation: Set the 'safe' flag to false when serializing non-dictionary objects in Django JSON encoded responses.

noncompliant.description: Serializes a non-dictionary object with the 'safe' flag set to True.

compliant.description: Serializes a non-dictionary object with the 'safe' flag set to False.

why_is_this_an_issue: When serializing non-dictionary objects with the 'safe' flag set to True, Django may use custom encoders for certain types, potentially introducing security vulnerabilities such as XSS and JSON injection.
how_to_fix: Set the 'safe' flag to false when serializing non-dictionary objects in Django JSON encoded responses.

metadata.title: Ensure safe flag is set to false when serializing non-dictionary objects in Django JSON encoded responses
